new_terms.context: PCB supplier for the LPX compute tray main board.
PCB supplier for the LPX compute tray main board.
Foxconn Interconnect Technology, a key supplier for backplane cable cartridges and connectors.
High-speed backplane connectors manufactured by Amphenol and licensed to FIT.
Nvidia's proprietary connector specification for the Kyber midplane.
Multi-fiber Push-On ports used for scale-out networking in the Kyber design.
Land Grid Array socket used to connect the Midboard Optical Module (MBOM) to the PCB.
A modular component for managing high-density cabling in NVL racks.
